allow: PowerShell(python -c "import sys; open\('.graphify_python','w'\).write\(sys.executable\)"; python -c "import json; from graphify.detect import detect; from pathlib import Path; result = detect\(Path\('.'\)\); open\('.graphify_detect.json','w'\).write\(json.dumps\(result\)\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import json; d = json.load\(open\('.claude/settings.local.json'\)\); hook = d['hooks']['PreToolUse'][0]; print\('matcher:', hook['matcher']\); print\('type:', hook['hooks'][0]['type']\); print\('command OK:', 'graphify-out/graph.json' in hook['hooks'][0]['command']\); print\('permissions preserved:', len\(d.get\('permissions',{}\).get\('allow', []\)\) > 0\)")

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
